items.title: history_backfill is a first-class service task
items.description: The service runner, durable queue, and worker all support a dedicated history_backfill task with optional explicit date ranges.

items.title: Scheduler prefers backfill for catch-up
items.description: When the source provider is ahead of the latest READY snapshot, scheduler enqueues history_backfill so catch-up is handled through a unified service path.

items.title: Backfill can be triggered through the backend API
items.description: The backend exposes POST /api/v1/tasks/history-backfill/run and app smoke verifies that the request is accepted, processed, and reported in task runs.
